creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
Committed. Thanks!

Protip:
Include a copy/paste ready commit message with a link to the changelog or a list of the changes.  Find out more at https://www.FreeBSD.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/committers-guide/commit-log-message.html.
